details.text: Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility.  If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)

extension.valueString: Mismatch in slicing rules at Patient.identifier: 'open' when the claimed profile has 'closed'

details.text: This profile does not comply with claimed profile 'http://hl7.org/fhir/test/StructureDefinition/complies-with-slice-open-vs-closed-base' because: Mismatch in slicing rules at Patient.identifier: 'open' when the claimed profile has 'closed'
